heading: Calculation of active service
label: 2515 Calculation of active service
text: Any service described, including service described prior to the date of enactment of the Don Young Coast Guard Authorization Act of 2022, in writing, including by electronic communication, by a representative of the Coast Guard Personnel Service Center as service that counts toward total active service for regular retirement under section 2152 or section 2306 shall be considered by the President as active service for purposes of applying section 2152 or section 2306 with respect to the determination of the retirement qualification for any officer or enlisted member to whom a description was provided.
notes: References in TextThe date of enactment of the Don Young Coast Guard Authorization Act of 2022, referred to in text, is the date of enactment of div. K of , which was approved .Pub. L. 117–263Dec. 23, 2022

Rule of Construction, , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–263, div. K, title CXII, § 11242(c)136 Stat. 4040Dec. 23, 2022“The amendment made by subsection (a) [enacting this section]—“(1)shall only apply to officers of the Coast Guard that entered active service after , temporarily separated for a period of time, and have retired from the Coast Guard before ; andJanuary 1, 1997January 1, 2024“(2)shall not apply to any member of any other uniformed service, or to any Coast Guard member regarding active service of the member in any other uniformed service.”
